sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 오라클은 클라우드 인프라 및 애플리케이션 수요 급증에 힘입어 2026 회계연도 4분기 및 연간 역대 최고 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 총 매출은 전년 대비 21% 증가한 192억 달러를 기록했으며, 클라우드 매출은 47% 성장한 99억 달러를 달성했습니다.
잔여 수행 의무(RPO)가 4분기 동안 850억 달러 증가하여 총 6,380억 달러에 도달하며 미래 매출 가시성을 높였습니다.

businessChanges.text: 고객들의 온프레미스 소프트웨어에서 클라우드로의 지속적인 전환으로 인해 소프트웨어 부문 매출은 4분기 2% 감소했습니다.
클라우드 인프라(IaaS)와 클라우드 애플리케이션(SaaS) 사업 전반에 걸친 광범위한 수요가 실적 성장을 견인했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 GAAP 주당순이익(EPS)은 1.45달러로 21% 증가했고, 비GAAP EPS는 2.11달러로 24% 증가했습니다.
2026 회계연도 연간 총 매출은 674억 달러로 전년 대비 17% 성장했습니다.
4분기 비GAAP 영업이익은 운영 효율성 개선에 힘입어 86억 달러를 기록하며 22% 성장했습니다.

watchItems.text: 온프레미스 소프트웨어 매출 감소세가 향후 클라우드 전환 속도와 결합하여 전체 수익성에 미칠 영향 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 orcl-ex99_1.htm EX-99.1 EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 For Immediate Release Contact: Ken Bond Deborah Hellinger Oracle Investor Relations Oracle Corporate Communications 1.650.607.0349 1.212.508.7935 ken.bond@oracle.com deborah.hellinger@oracle.com Oracle Announces Record Q4 and FY 2026 Results Driven by Cloud Infrastructure & Cloud Applications • Record Remaining Performance Obligations grew $85 billion in Q4 from $553 billion to $638 billion • Record Q4 Earnings per Share GAAP up 21% USD to $1.45, non-GAAP up 24% USD to $2.11 1 • Record Q4 Total Revenues $19.2 billion, up 21% USD, and up 20% constant currency • Record Q4 Total Cloud Revenues $9.9 billion, up 47% USD, and up 46% constant currency o Q4 Cloud Infra (IaaS  Normalized numeric aliases: $85 billion = 850억 달러; $553 billion = 5,530억 달러; $638 billion = 6,380억 달러; $19.2 billion = 192억 달러; $9.9 billion = 99억 달러; $5.8 billion = 58억 달러; $4.1 billion = 41억 달러; $85 = 85달러; $553 = 553달러; $638 = 638달러; $1.45 = 1.45달러; $2.11 = 2.11달러.

nings per Share GAAP up 34% USD to $5.83, non-GAAP up 27% USD to $7.63 1 • Record FY 2026 Total Revenues $67.4 billion, up 17% USD, and up 16% constant currency • Record FY 2026 Total Cloud Revenues $34.0 billion, up 39% USD, and up 37% constant currency o FY 2026 Cloud Infra (IaaS) Revenue $18.1 billion, up 77% USD, and up 75% constant currency o FY 2026 Cloud Apps (SaaS) Revenue $15.9 billion, up 11% USD, and up 10% constant currency AUSTIN, Texas, June 10, 2026 -- Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) today announced another record quarter with strong revenue growth across its Cloud Infrastructure and Cloud Applications businesses. Total quarterly revenues increased 21% to $19.2 billion, reflecting broad-based demand for  Normalized numeric aliases: $67.4 billion = 674억 달러; $34.0 billion = 340억 달러; $18.1 billion = 181억 달러; $15.9 billion = 159억 달러; $19.2 billion = 192억 달러; $9.9 billion = 99억 달러; $5.83 = 5.83달러; $7.63 = 7.63달러; $67.4 = 67.4달러; $34.0 = 34.0달러; $18.1 = 18.1달러; $15.9 = 15.9달러.

(IaaS), and 10% growth in Cloud Applications (SaaS). Software revenues were down 2% to $6.8 billion, reflecting our customers’ continuing migration from on-premise software to the Cloud. Services revenues were $1.5 billion, up 13%, and Hardware revenues were $0.9 billion, up 9%. Oracle generated Q4 GAAP operating income of $6.1 billion, up 20%, while non-GAAP operating income rose to a record $8.6 billion, up 22%, driven by strong revenue growth and operating efficiency actions taken during the quarter. GAAP net income available to common shareholders reached $4.2 billion, up 23%, and non-GAAP net income available to common shareholders grew to $6.2 billion, up 26%. Q4 GAAP earnings per share increased to $1.45, up 21%,   Normalized numeric aliases: $6.8 billion = 68억 달러; $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $6.1 billion = 61억 달러; $8.6 billion = 86억 달러; $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $6.2 billion = 62억 달러; $67.4 billion = 674억 달러; $6.8 = 6.8달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러; $6.1 = 6.1달러.
